title: You Are Invited to the "Visualization and Animation" Event!
content:
You Are Invited to the "Visualization and Animation" Event!

Join us at the

Visualization and Animation

event!

This event, organized by the Department of Cartoon and Animation in collaboration with Digital Panorama Advertising Agency, welcomes all Faculty of Communication students.

Date

: Wednesday, November 6, 2024

Time

Location

: Fuat Sezgin Conference Hall, 1st basement floor, Block C, South Campus.

Speakers from Digital Panorama Advertising Agency, including Kaan Azov, Zehra Alkan, and Teberdar Gürbey, will share insights. The session will be moderated by Lecturer Özgül Öztürk from the Department of Cartoon and Animation.

As a part of the

University Culture

course, this event

will feature discussions on industry trends, workflows, different business models, and career roadmaps in the fields of visualization and animation. We look forward to seeing you there on Wednesday at 11:00 a.m.!
